# Scan report from sightjack

This is a synthetic D-Mail fixture used by the paintress jun15 MCP
pivot contract test (refs/issues/0027 §8). It exercises the 9-field
envelope schema without requiring a real sightjack emit.

## Findings

- Cluster `auth` shows 3 unresolved P1 issues.
- Cluster `payments` is fully resolved (= no follow-up needed).
- Wave 4 is recommended as the next expedition target.

(This body is intentionally short; real scan reports are larger.)
